heading: MongoDB Atlas AWS CloudFormation Resources
body:
Atlas CloudFormation Resources helps you to manage
MongoDB Atlas. It simplifies provisioning and management of
Atlas features on AWS (Amazon Web Services). You can create YAML- or JSON-based templates
for the service or application architectures you want and have AWS (Amazon Web Services)
CloudFormation use those templates for quick and reliable provisioning
of the services or applications (called "stacks"). You can also easily
update or replicate the stacks as needed.

> **See Also:** 
>
> - [Learn more about Atlas CloudFormation](https://www.mongodb.com/atlas/aws-cloudformation).
>
> - [Atlas CloudFormation Resources](https://github.com/mongodb/mongodbatlas-cloudformation-resources/).
